user.title: Set up a Bag
user.description: Create a new bag of items to pick from randomly.

error.items_empty: Please enter at least one item.

init.title: Edit Bag Items
init.description: Update the list of items. Changes will reset the current bag cycle.

error.items_empty: Please enter at least one item.

pick_next.name: Pick next
pick_next.description: Pick the next item from the bag. Reshuffles automatically when the bag is exhausted.

reset.name: Reset bag
reset.description: Reshuffle the bag from scratch, discarding the current cycle.
